description: Docsie is a documentation and knowledge platform that turns videos, files, and other source material into structured documentation, training content, and knowledge portals. It also provides hosted help-center and content management capabilities for teams publishing internal or customer-facing docs.
summary: Docsie exposes a documented HTTP Partner API and an MCP server at app.docsie.io; both appear to require authentication, with docs indicating API-key auth for the API and OAuth-gated access for MCP.
